title: CommunityBoardAppointment
description: An appointment of a member to one of the Bronx's twelve community boards. Appointing/recommending community-board members is a core NYC Charter duty of the Borough President (half directly, half on the recommendation of the district's Council Members). Canonical schema reconciling the 'Bronx Community Boards' Open Data dataset (wbau-xy7g, 7 columns). This is one of only two entities the office currently publishes as machine-readable data.

recommendingOfficial.description: Official who recommended the appointment — the Borough President or the district Council Member ('Recommending Official').

applicationZipCode.description: ZIP code on the member's application ('Zip Code of Application').
